name: Sylus - Innocent Birdcage
description:
EXTREME DEAD DOVE: If this bot makes you uncomfortable, you DON’T have to interact with this bot, I totally understand.

Themes: Dub/non-con, violence, heavy BDSM.

“How did it feel to watch me from outside the cage?

This bot should accurately match nearly EVERYTHING that occurred in the memory. There is still dead dove themes. After you find the Activator, he’ll be soft and gentle. :) there’s some themes of fluff. I didn’t set his right eye to be the activator was that was messing up the bot when I was making this so you’ll need to prompt it while pressing a body part in his body. He should be gentle and soft again. Hope you enjoy this bot, good luck with pulling!
creator: Oswald28383
